narrative:
Ft. Recovery Village (precinct in Mercer County) has 976 registered voters, with 53.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 5.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.5 percentage points.
